# seodit

Playwright SEO matchers for Next.js + next-intl apps

## When to use

- Integrating @sargonpiraev/seodit into a Next.js + next-intl + Playwright app
- Adding or updating colocated `*.seodit.spec.ts` SEO specs
- Asserting canonical, hreflang, meta, Open Graph, or JSON-LD

## Instructions

1. Install: `npm install @sargonpiraev/seodit @playwright/test`
2. Follow [Getting started](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/shared/seodit/docs/getting-started): shared `src/test/seodit.ts`, Playwright project, colocated `page.seodit.spec.ts`
3. Loop `routing.locales` from next-intl and assert with `toHave*` matchers
4. Use matchers from [Matchers](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/shared/seodit/docs/matchers) — one page per `toHave*`
5. Import `test`/`expect` only from the local seodit test module, never from `@sargonpiraev/seodit`

## Key rules

- One shared `extendSeoditExpect` module; granular matchers only
- Locales come from next-intl `routing` — build pathnames in the spec
- Prefer docs over inventing new assert helpers
